entry.title: Re: Hierarchy View of Trial Balance Using /C_TRIALBALANCE...
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, 

 

Unfortunately, as of now it is not possible to get a Hierarchical View by using the API C_TRIALBALANCE.

In order to get a trial balance with hierarchical view please follow the steps below:

  1. Trial Balance App.
  2. Enter input parameters.
  3. Adapt Filters.
  4. Include G/L Hierarchy and G/L Hierarchy (Node).
  5. Input both fields.
  6. Go.
  7. The display now filters the G/L Hierarchy.

 

I hope this helps!

 

Best Regards,

SAP Product Support

entry.title: Navigate to a sub-structure V_TKA02 of a View Cluster containing another view.
entry.content:
Hello,

we need do something similar to https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/navigate-to-a-sub-structure-of-a-view-cluster-containing-another-view/m-p/12161008.

The need is to insert a new trading partner to a given company code.
We access the view, but at the time of clicking "new entries" or do scroll the co reported company is lost.
Any idea how to do it?
thanks

entry.title: Re: How to clear old tasks on SuccessFactors dashboard
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Do we have any solution where active tasks like assign a buddy and recommended links to be archive from Dashboard after certain period even the tasks is not completed. .

entry.title: Re: How to call API endpoint on BTP nodejs app from anoth...
entry.content:
Well, apparently it was working correctly all along:

The error turned out to be between chair and keyboard. The circular JSON error I wasn't able to pinpoint in the NPM module turned out to be originating from this line in my code:

logger.info(`Request OK: ${JSON.stringify(data)}`);

because apparently executeHttpRequest returns the whole response object, not just the response data.

Changing it to

logger.info(`Request OK: ${JSON.stringify(data.data)}`);

returned the expected response just fine and apparently I have wasted quite some hours debugging something that already worked just fine...

entry.title: Re: planning versus budget enterprise project
entry.content:
Hi Rene,

the planning categories are basically related to different use cases. PLN planning category is to plan project values and to compare them to actual bookings in the multiple reports we have available. BUDGET01 planning category is related to budget availability control so in case you want to block e.g. actual cost postings because the budget is exceeded. PLN is typically "just" used for comparison reasons, it doesn't have technical effects on follow-up processes. 

Practically, if the budget availability control values are identical to your plan values, you could also just use BUDGET01 as the planning category field is available to select in most of the reports that we have available. Nevertheless, best practice recommends to distinguish PLN from BUDGET01 with BUDGET01 being solely used for availability control which is delivered through SSCUI Maintain Budget Availability Control Profile for Projects (102413).

Hope that helps
Johannes

entry.title: Re: Looking for a list of master data objects which are c...
entry.content:
Please check this SAP Community page for information about the different MDG versions in the private and public cloud. It also has information about the data model coverage of each version.

Generally, as of today...

  • SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition, master data governance is applicable for customer, supplier, product, and financial master data and provides openness for custom-defined objects. It also has SAP partner-based solution extensions featuring governance of enterprise asset and retail master data. For details on the data models, see the relevant chapters on this SAP Community How-To-Page.
  • SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition, master data governance is applicable for business partner (incl. customer, supplier) and product data.
  • SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition is applicable for business partner data. 

See also the SAP Community Topic main page for SAP Master Data Governance.

entry.title: Isle of Man (IM country code) country needs to be sent as GB in documentation for Dutch Customs
entry.content: I have a requirement for Dutch customs for shipments coming from Isle of Man (country code IM) to come across with country code GB. I thought maybe somewhere on the country setup there would be a place to put this type of alternate country code that I could then just refer to and pull for documentation sent to Dutch customs but I am not seeing anything. Is there any suggestions or guidance for this type of issue - I know of at least 3 country codes (I believe they are called British Crown Dependencies) where the actual code is one thing but at least Dutch customs requires GB instead. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP BI 4.2 SP5 - Promotion Management Wizard
entry.content:
The first time you will need to manually type in the name of Server, once you have actually run the job at least once the name will show up in the drop down list next time.  Initially it only shows the name of the Server where the PMW is run because that is the only server it is aware of.

Ajay

entry.title: Re: Professional Services in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 Release
entry.content: Hi,quick question - which part of professional services scope can be used to capture engagement management and contract management before a project can be initiated? @KatharinaStopf

entry.title: Re: HANA Calculation View and Package Visibility
entry.content:
Hi Alexs,
If your calculation views are using security mode "definer" that is the default. The users only require SELECT privilege on the top views and not the underlying views.

entry.title: Re: Updating contract conditions using BAPI_CUSTOMERCONTRACT_CHANGE
entry.content:
👎 (-1)

I don't understand why this answer is marked as an "accepted solution" because it doesn't say anything about the contract conditions (the question).

entry.title: How is the order of parameter prompts in UNX Universe set?
entry.content: Hello, in UNX universe, I have two parameter prompts (Start and End Dates).  What determines the row order?  I'd prefer the Start Date parameter row come before the End Data parameter row.

entry.title: Re: SAP BI 4.2 SP5 - Promotion Management Wizard
entry.content:
Hi @CdnConnection 

Thanks for your reply. I'm not sure how i can even initially type the server name in. From the image i posted above. The white fields are free type and they grey fields are select only drop down fields. 

It's also the same when after selecting the temp and log destinations, when logging into a CMS; server name is select only drop down. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Create Sales Order into SAP B1 using DI API, SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi nikunjmehta2290,

Use the following sample code:

 

SAPbobsCOM.Documents oSalesOrder = (SAPbobsCOM.Documents)oCompany.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oOrders);
oSalesOrder.CardCode = "C20000";
oSalesOrder.Rounding = BoYesNoEnum.tYES;
oSalesOrder.RoundingDiffAmount = -1;
oSalesOrder.DocDueDate = new DateTime(2024, 02, 29);
oSalesOrder.Comments = "Created via DIAPI";
oSalesOrder.Lines.ItemCode = "A00001";
oSalesOrder.Lines.UnitPrice = 100;
int AINV = oSalesOrder.Add();

 

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: predefined SAP group of fiori transaction
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I am looking for a way to easily find out the group assigned to a bunch of Transactions in order to modify the standard ones deleting the unwanted transactions.

as example I looked up in Fiori reference library but the defined group seems not present in my system (GTS on S/4 hana 2023 ).

I looked for Classify Producs (Legal Control) in reference library and I got  (https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2390')/S28OP )

 

Is there a way to find the Launchpad Fiori group of the transaction?

Cheers,

GIamma

entry.title: Re: Issue on webtests with SAP Commerce 2205P1
entry.content:
Recently had a similar issue on newly assigned project. Ther root cause is in InlineDelegateByteBuddyMockMaker, which should be replaced with ProxyMockMaker. You can read in this article how to do that https://clutcher.github.io/post/hybris/fix_mockito_codegen_issue/

SAP Commerce Cloud SAP Commerce

entry.title: Re: FB03 Attachment List for F110 Payment file
entry.content: have you solved the issue?

entry.title: Re: unable to configure cloud connector configuration
entry.content:
Hi Jitendra, 

simply follow the instructions of the message:  Consult SAP note 2461997 for possible remedies.

Best regards,
Markus

entry.title: Is there a Mass update app for CS40 'Create Link to Configurable Material' ?
entry.content:
We're using variant configuration for make to stock. We  create material variants and want to do mass create link to configurable material. App CS40 only allows us to do one by one.

Pls help to suggest us any way we can do it?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there a Mass update app for CS40 'Create Link to C...
entry.content:
Unfortunately there is no API , Migration Object or alternative app for CS40 to mass update the link to configurable material

 

Please follow the KBA 2963059 ( https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2963059 ) and submit a feature request if you would like it added in a future release

entry.title: Re: Unable to Fetch Distinct Values using For loop and Cursor in SAP HANA.
entry.content:
@JimSpath 
When I run the below SQL directly on the Database table, I get 10 distinct results. But when fetched thru the For Loop am not getting those 10 records. Instead I am getting only 5 of them. My loop logic is incorrect somewhere. 

SELECT DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_NAMES FROM "H_CPO_MAIN"."TABLE_NURO";

entry.title: Re: How to identify if a role is read or write in SAP R/3 ?
entry.content:
Hello,

in addition to the answer from @matt, viewing the table AGR_1251 might be useful for your needs (AGR_1251 contains the authorization values of roles). In SUIM you can search roles for a single field value only, so you have to execute a search for ACTVT 01, another one for ACTVT 02 and so on. In SE16 you can do this in a single task. 

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: How to check runtime CR 13 with SP 25 installed from an App and then launch silent installer
entry.content:
Hi everybody

My App is a Winform coded with VB 2019 and framework 2.0 with CR 13 SP25.

When my App starts, it  needs to check if runtimes 32 and 64 bits are installed, and then launch Installer in order to install them.

First, in order to check, i've used this code: 

System.Reflection.Assembly.Load("CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine, Version=13.0.3500.0, Culture=neutral,PublicKeyToken=692fbea5521e1304")

If runtime is not installed, then this line thow an exception that I catch.

It works fine, but i can't detect if runtime installed is 32 bits o 64 bits. I need detect it, so then I launch de right installer. how can i do that?  My App works in 32 bits and 64 bits, depends on machine.

Second, how can I launch runtime installer and make an silent instalation without wizard dialog (no UI). Is is possible? can Runtime installer accept comand line and parameters?

I appreciate your help!

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Reprocessing Multiple Outbound IDOCs from BD87
entry.content: Maintain the Package size as in Partner Profile

entry.title: Re: How is the order of parameter prompts in UNX Universe set?
entry.content: It seems to only be alphabetical, is that correct?

entry.title: Predict, Personalize, Prosper: BTP AI Capabilities Redefining Retail Intelligence - Part 3/3
entry.content:
Welcome to the third part of our blog series where we explore how SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) is revolutionizing retail by enabling predictive insights, personalized interactions and ultimately prosperity in the enterprise. In this part, we provide an overview of the BTP architecture and its transformative capabilities, focusing on key components such as the SAP HANA Vector Engine, SAP GenAI Hub and Cloud Foundry.

Part 1 - Predict, Personalize, Prosper: Crafting Tomorrow's Retail Experience with RAG
Part 2 - Predict, Personalize, Prosper: ReAct's Decision-Making in Retail
Part 3 - Predict, Personalize, Prosper: BTP AI Capabilities Redefining Retail Intelligence

Architectural overview of the BTP

The SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) is a comprehensive suite of tools and services designed to help companies achieve greater flexibility, innovation and intelligence. At its core, BTP seamlessly integrates various components to provide a unified platform for application development, deployment and management. Leveraging the power of SAP HANA Vector Engine, SAP GenAI Hub and Cloud Foundry, BTP provides retailers with a solid foundation for AI-driven insights and personalized experiences. Below is an architecture overview showing the individual components of an AI Store Assistant mentioned above

AI Store Assistant Architecture

Let's take a closer look at the individual components and highlight their capabilities to enable AI innovation

SAP HANA Vector Engine

At the heart of BTP's AI capabilities is the SAP HANA Vector Engine, a high-performance database optimized for processing vector-based operations. In the context of retail, the SAP HANA Vector Engine serves as a powerhouse for storing embeddings and enables fast and efficient retrieval of relevant data. By using this engine, retailers can seamlessly access and analyze volumes of data understandable to Large Language Models (LLMs), leading to predictive insights and personalized interactions. More information about the SAP HANA Vector Engine can be found here.

SAP GenAI Hub

The SAP HANA Vector Engine is complemented by the SAP GenAI Hub, a comprehensive platform for the development and deployment of LLM-based AI models. With the GenAI Hub, retailers can access a variety of pre-trained language models and customize them to their specific requirements. With this feature, retailers can send prompts to various Large Language Models (such as GPT-4 by Azure OpenAI or OpenSource Falcon-40b) and use their advanced natural language processing capabilities to generate contextualized responses. The GenAI Hub can be deployed as part of the SAP AI Core. Further information can be found here.

Cloud Foundry

To bring these capabilities to life, BTP leverages the power of Cloud Foundry, an open source platform-as-a-service (PaaS) environment. By deploying Python-based applications on Cloud Foundry, retailers can quickly develop and deploy AI-driven solutions. As an example, the use of Python frameworks such as Flask (web framework) and LangChain (AI framework) helps to quickly deploy scalable AI applications. In addition, Cloud Foundry provides retailers with the flexibility and scalability they need to adapt to changing business requirements.

Example: AI Store Assistant

To illustrate this architecture in practice, we look at the AI Store Assistant - a revolutionary tool and proof-of-concept for improving operational activities in a store. The AI Store Assistant utilizes BTP's AI capabilities and integrates seamlessly with SAP S/4HANA and Industry Cloud (such as Omnichannel Promotion Pricing Service- OPPS) solutions to retrieve relevant data. Based on prompts generated by the SAP GenAI Hub, the AI Store Assistant can obtain information, make suggestions and ultimately perform these as follow-up actions. In the example below, a prediction can be made for certain product groups or actions can be created for expiring goods. The AI Store Assistant also has the option of providing charts and tables in addition to text.

AI Store Assistant predicting sales revenue

Conclusion

In summary, SAP Business Technology Platform is redefining retail intelligence by leveraging advanced AI capabilities to predict, personalize and prosper. Through the seamless integration of SAP HANA Vector Engine, SAP GenAI Hub and Cloud Foundry, the BTP enables retailers to gain new insights and innovation. As we move into the future of retail, let's continue to harness the transformative power of BTP to create personalized and impactful experiences for customers worldwide. Join us on this journey of innovation and discovery as we shape the future of retail intelligence together.

entry.title: SAP Developer News, March 21st, 2024
entry.content:
Podcast Version: SAP Developer News March 21st, 2024 – SAP Developers (opensap.info)

DESCRIPTION:

SAPinsider Las Vegas: Overview of the week
  - SAP CodeJams: https://groups.community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/gh-p/code-jam 

'Did You Know' shorts Nr. 17 – Using browser-based SSO with the btp CLI 
  - Log in help: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/log-in 

SAP Build Code Ask Me Anything 
  - Webinar page: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-btp-ask-me-anything-series-sap-build-code/ba-p/13620439 

WebdriverIO and wdi5 community event 
  - Event page: https://webdriver.io/community/events/2024-04-11-webdriverio-meets-wdi5-meets-ui5/ 

AI Developer Challenge 
  - Event page: https://sapinsider.org/events/vegas2024-developer-challenge/ 

===========================================================

CHAPTER TITLES 

0:00 Intro 
0:10 SAPinsider Las Vegas: Overview of the week 
1:15 'Did You Know' shorts Nr. 17 – Using browser-based SSO with the btp CLI 
1:50 SAP Build Code Ask Me Anything 
2:47 WebdriverIO and wdi5 community event 
3:31 AI Developer Challenge 

================================================================

TRANSCRIPTION

Josh & Rich: Hey everybody, welcome to this week's special edition of the Developer News. I'm here with
Rich Heilman, I'm Josh Bentley. We're very happy to have Thomas Jung behind the camera. Nora's inside
getting ready for a great show, but I wanted to highlight two sessions I'm doing. I'm going to be showcasing
SAP Build and going through the CodeJams that we can do for you in America and around the world on the
CodeJams that have been built by Ian and Shrini and the team with Daniel. Really getting some great
content out there. What's really nice is we'll get a really wet your appetite session done today and then
tomorrow I jump into a what runtime should I use when I'm using SAP BTP. Now I don't know anything about
what Rich is doing so let's ask him. Rich, what are you doing? Yeah so of course I'm doing an ABAP. So I'm
doing a lecture session with S4HANA extensibility and then we're doing a two-hour hands-on session with
RAP. So the ABAP RESTful applications for a great reply. Nice. What have you been doing the rest of the
day? I'm checking out some sessions and talk some customers and partners seeing what they're up to,
having a good time. Very nice. Alright folks, hope you enjoy it.

DJ: Did you know the BTP CLI supports single sign-on via the browser? This is a great option for when
you're already authenticated in your browser, through whatever identity provider you use. One short couple
of clicks, and you're locked in.

Thomas: Well, coming to you from SAP Insider in Las Vegas, we have exciting news about the upcoming
launch of SAP Build Code. We're just days away from the product launch on March the 27th. Also to
celebrate the launch of SAP Build Code, we have a BTP Ask Me Anything webinar series taking place on
that day. So you can sign up now and if you don't know anything about Build Code, you'll get your first
introduction to it, or come with questions about SAP Build Code. On launch day, we're going to have tons of
other activities starting off, as well as blog posts to describe Build Code, new tutorials badges to be earned,
and keep an eye out later in April for some live streams that will go over the generative AI capabilities of
Build Code as well. So we're gearing up for all the excitement of SAP Build Code, and can't wait for you to
be able to try the final product.

Nico: Hi everyone, and welcome to the SAP Developer News. We just wrapped up a fantastic
ConnectingSAP event here in South Africa, and I just wanted to let you know that there is a great community
event coming up on April 11th in Waldorf, Germany. It's about WebDriver.io, the popular browser and mobile
test automation framework, and about WDI5, which is the WebDriver.io service for testing UI5 applications.
to meet some familiar faces in the UI5 world, as well as the core maintainers of WebDriver.io and connect
with them over a cup of coffee. You can catch all the details about the event in the description and I hope to
see you soon. Bye!

Nora: Hey, I was super excited to see all the really cool use cases that came out of the code challenge here
on Monday at the SAPInsider that we hosted. And the teams had a lot of really cool use cases and they
implemented a lot of different approaches using large language models ranging from retrieval augmented
generation to giving the large language models tools to use like a search engine or a very advanced prompt
engineering and the winning team actually implemented an assistant that they even integrated into an ABAP
system that would help their customers answer questions about error messages and what they did was they
actually leveraged the entire information on the SAP community platform. So that was really cool and they
get to go to the Cirque du Soleil tonight. Yeah, so a lot of really cool things happening here and see you!

entry.title: Re: Log Analysis for the Standard Framework of Situation Handling
entry.content:
Hi menno_vanmil,
all true what Axel said.
One thought from my side you might want to check.
As you may have seen the scheduler runs every 15 minutes. Your situation type has probably a single time specified as start time for example 01:00 AM. Now you would need to search for those scheduler runs that fit you timing.
For Example: Time Zone: UTC; Repeat Type: Daily; Repeat Interval: 12 Hrs; Start Time: 01:00. You should see a detection for scheduler log entry after 1AM and after 1PM.
All other runs would have the no sittype and no instance given that this is the only enabled type in your system.
Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: SAP BI 4.2 SP5 - Promotion Management Wizard
entry.content:
The first login is login to the highest version of CMS.  If you migrating from BI 4.2 to BI 4.3, you MUST run the PMW on BI 4.3 server and first login will be to the BI 4.3 server.  See below like with more in-depth overview of PMW

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=saaia4acbMU

Ajay

entry.title: Reporte de cumplimiento de las recomendaciones de inventario ciclico
entry.content:
Saludos a la comunidad, agradezco su apoyo en el siguiente caso:

Que consulta puedo realizar para validar que las "Recomendaciones de Inventario Cíclico" tengan su correspondiente "Recuento de Inventario", es decir, listar si los conteos por grupo de artículos se cumplieron en la fecha establecida para contar según el ciclo de inventario creado.

Agradezco el apoyo

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA - Notification Type S1 not defined
Re: Can we show short definitions of the values in the Do...
entry.content:
You can get the domain fixed values from table DD07T or FM DDUT_DOMVALUES_GET.

Read the internal table using the key and pass the description to the output field.

Declare text field (CHAR60) in ALV structure instead of custom domain type.

entry.title: SNP heuristics - use stock of same products from different location
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we have simple case for SNP heuristics planning:

Product A in Location 1000 moves to Location 2000. We will start planning of A in Location 2000 and want to achieve that an inventory, receipts and demand in Location 1000 is being aggregated / used while we plan A in Loc 2000. Example: A has 100 pieces in stock in Lo1000, A in Loc2000 has not stock but a customer demand of 100 pieces - how could we tell the SNP heuristics to consider the stock of A in 1000 as "available" and not reorder anything ?

Regards

Thomas

entry.title: Re: planning versus budget enterprise project
entry.content: Thanks Johannes but the PLN data is used for revenue recognition or can I change this?

entry.title: SAP Data intelligence
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working in BW/4 hana, I need to create some pipeline in SAP DI, Could you please provide some training link and step by step process to learn.

Regards

Pranita

entry.title: Re: Unable to Fetch Distinct Values using For loop and Cursor in SAP HANA.
entry.content:
Interesting.

Can you do a SQL trace and look for something like this?

FETCH ... LIMIT 5

Is there any configuration for data cache buffers such that the next set is returned by a subsequent FETCH? Packet size, or something.

entry.title: Re: planning versus budget enterprise project
entry.content: Correct, PLN is pre-maintained and unchangeable according to the revenue recognition settings from SSCUI Maintain Settings for Event-Based Revenue Recognition (102530)

entry.title: Re: How to create a new purchasing group to assign a person?
entry.content: Can you confirm what product and version you are working with?

entry.title: Re: Initial Release of SAP Analytics Cloud Just Ask
entry.content:
Hi Francois, 

Thanks for the good explanation on Just Ask.

Couple of questions:

1. Which one give better results? Indexed Model or Non Indexed Model?

2. Administrator needs to define the Synonyms. In a larger platform where there are multiple such models, don't you think it is not Realistic for the Administrator to maintain the synonyms. Administrator will not have a complete idea on what the Model is aimed at doing. The Developer/User of the model would be the right person to maintain this. What is your thought?

3. It is required to maintain the model everytime the user launches Just Ask?

 

Regards,

Sayed Zubair

entry.title: Re: ATP confirmation behavior - result mode explanation
entry.content:
Hi Arindam,

Option A will lead to "One-time delivery" irrespective whether you are in interactive or in batch mode. Option D lead to a different behavior in these two modes.

Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: SAP Trading Partner Management non standard messages format
entry.content:
Hi Community,

is it possible to work with SAP Trading Partner Management in SAP Integration Suite with a non standard message format  ? In the specific use case we are getting text line based (kind of CSV) messages and ideally we can also route this traffic via the SAP Trading Partner Management instead of creating sperate custom iflows. Message protocoll would be AS2.

Thanks

Best regards

DL

entry.title: Re: How to create a new purchasing group to assign a person?
entry.content: ECC version and to give support live

entry.title: Re: How to work with exemptions using ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud during development in an
entry.content:
Hello Olga,

First of all thanks for your Blogs which helped us to setup BTP ABAP Environment CVA as Central Check.

We have setup of BTP ABAP Environment CVA as Central Check. S4 on premise private Edition as Check system. I have raised Exemption from Eclipse for S4 on premise program.

Exemption request can be seen in Approve Exemption App but Approve/Reject options are disabled. In details also Edit/Approve/reject option is disabled. How to fix this issue.

One more Query : When we perform ATC checks from on Premise system (Checked system) with variant of SAP BTP ABAP environment (Central system). Do we have any APP in BTP where as a Quality manager can view all ATC checks performed in past as history. What are remaining errors or warnings even after user has released TR.

Thanks & regards

Prashant

entry.title: Email to Supplier after approving the PO
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

The purchase Order should not get triggered for approval even after changing any Condition, deleting material or clicking on delivery completed.

Kindly have a look into this matter on high priority.

Thank You


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BSP SD_SO_CRE has no Page in SE80have to get the key for this object to entry WHAT??
entry.content:
SM21: Fehlermeldung Objekt /sap/bc/bsp/sap/sd_so_cre ist ungültig;

Laut OSS fehlt hier die Einsteigs-BSP;

wenn ich das ändern will, brauche ich Schlüssel für dieses Objekt

Wie kann ich das in Z kopieren?

Was trage ich denn da ein? Muss ich da vorher eine PAGE gestalten? Dafür nutze ich VS, bitte keine Erklärungen für WEBIDE!

Danke,

Heike

translate yourself with deepl.

entry.title: Re: Email to Supplier after approving the PO
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Delete/undelete can trigger the workflow again as there would be changes in the net order value. 

For the email to the supplier, you may need to look at SSCUI 102272 and make arrangements. 

You can also refer : https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/prevent-second-auto-email-of-a-po-upon-po-change/qaq-p/12381512

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Strategy base Monthly PM along with the factory calendar
entry.content:
Hi Terence,

Scheduling Indicator is the Factory Calendar, but the system is still proposing dates in 2026 because the System counts only working days according to the factory calendar, not based on the strategy

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - build service not working since 24 hours
entry.content: This morning I tried a web build with 4.9.201 and it worked.  Thanks so much for efforts.

entry.title: NT 2020.001, versão 1.50 – Evento de manifestação do destinatário
entry.content:
Já saiu o manual novo da NT conforme abaixo, mas não encontro notas da nova versão na SNOTE SAP.

1- Sabem se a SAP está fazendo?

2- Se vai mudar SAP, GRC e PI?

3- Quais e quantas são as notas?

4- Tem alguma nota FAQ? 

5- Só NF-e vai ser alterado ou CT-e Também?

Manual: NT_2020.001-v1.50.pdf (inventti.com.br)

Essas são as versões e datas: 01/07/2024 - Homologação e 01/08/2024 subida para PRD

Na Sap só encontro nota da versão 1.0 de 2020

entry.title: Re: How to work with exemptions using ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud during development in an
entry.content:
Hi Prashant,

the role SAP_BR_QUALITY_MNGR_SW_DEV must be created with "Write"-Access, then you will see the Approve/Reject buttons.

Regarding your second question: if you use developer scenario: executing checks in your on-premise (checked) system using the SAP BTP ABAP environment as a central check system, then the remote ATC checks run locally in your on-premise system, the result of your ATC run is also local in the on-premise system, it is only for developers, QM would use the Custom Code Migration app in the SAP BTP ABAP environment for the central ATC runs to get an overview about remaining findings in the system.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Strategy base Monthly PM along with the factory calendar
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, Thats why i was asking, how you have setup the Factory Calendar. This requirement cannot be handled in standard. You need to enhance the scheduling logic to consider the name of the days. Currently scheduling works based on days only.

In case when you use weekly also, if you align one month, next month will not flow. 

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: Groovy to extract text from PDF in CPI
entry.content:
Really good. I followed your guide and it worked. 

I have bookmarked this for future use. I appreciate your help.

entry.title: ABAP cron parser?
entry.content:
Hi,

is there a ABAP CRON parser available?

In node.js there is e.g. this package which I can give a CRON expression and I get back an object that lets me retrieve the next date object it fulfills.

var parser = require('cron-parser');

try {
  var interval = parser.parseExpression('*/2 * * * *');

  console.log('Date: ', interval.next().toString()); // Sat Dec 29 2012 00:42:00 GMT+0200 (EET)
  console.log('Date: ', interval.next().toString()); // Sat Dec 29 2012 00:44:00 GMT+0200 (EET)

  console.log('Date: ', interval.prev().toString()); // Sat Dec 29 2012 00:42:00 GMT+0200 (EET)
  console.log('Date: ', interval.prev().toString()); // Sat Dec 29 2012 00:40:00 GMT+0200 (EET)
} catch (err) {
  console.log('Error: ' + err.message);
}

entry.title: Hello all,Can someone through light on how the scheduled start ,end date and time calculated .
entry.content: Hello all in Sap pm  under the operation tab in Work order schedulde start and end time should be according to the time given in Work center for the assigned capacity,and the schedulde start and end date should be according to the Factory calendar assigned to WC but is not behaving like this.Can someone help me to understand this?

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Migration Cockpit Query for Transactional Data migration
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a client requirement where we require to migrate transactional data from SAP Onpremise to SAP Public Cloud for every (open + closed) line items for running fiscal year with migration key date is in Feb . We required to know for the period of mar & Feb  if we migrate every document from legacy to Public Cloud what are the limitations we have in terms of open items, accruals, credit memos, partial open or closed items , payment & every other document types considered under standard posting scenarios. Also if you have any OSS notes,KBAs for this please provide it for reference.

 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud Migration Cockpit Query for Transact...
entry.content:
Please refer customer to the related migration object documentations. In this documentation are further helpful links available. Useful is also the Migration of Financial Accounting Master Data and Transactional Data -> Purpose | SAP Help Portal 

Important: only (open) Open Items are supported not already closed. From partially open items only the items which are open must be migrated.

Please explore the help portal link and you will get to know the released migration objects and restrictions.

entry.title: Onboarding Custom Task Business Rule Support
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I have a specific requirement to ensure that an optional field is filled with value if the parent field value is "Yes".

For example, for my custom task, the MDF is configured as such:

  • Do you need a car?
  • Car Number

The first field is configured as mandatory with values "Yes" or "No".

The second field is configured as optional string field.

If a user select "Yes" for the first field, I would need a rule to ensure that the second field is not equal to null.

I have created a business rule and place it under Save rules and Validate rules. However, it is not working. May I check if business rule is supported for custom task. If not, is there any way I can achieve the requirement?

entry.title: Re: Get your development through a 3SL landscape with Multi-Off
entry.content:
Hi,
sorry for the late reply. What exactly are you looking for in BTP ABAP Environment and in on-premise?

In on-premise, gCTS is available since SAP S/4HANA 1909 - better if you start with SAP S/4HANA 2020 at least. You can use it to manage your ABAP development processes by the help of Git. Documentation is availale in here: https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/4a368c163b08418890a406d413933ba7/f319b168e87e42149e25e13c08d002b9.html

In BTP ABAP Environment, gCTS is used in the background of the Software Component App. the software components are stored in a git repository. You can find that documented in here: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/manage-software-components. 

Recently an option to use your own git repository has been added to BTP ABAP Environment. You can find the details in a blog post by Christoph Pohl: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/bring-your-own-git-for-sap-btp-abap-environment/ba-p/13585439

Does this answer your question?

Thanks and kind regards
Karin

entry.title: Re: Followup LSO Course Program not working
entry.content:
Dear guys,

we also facing the same situation as Oliver. The training program will be followed up by the admins in the backend. But there is no delimitation process for EK-P link. This is still 31.12.9999 after follow up.

An the delimit column in the old follow up pic from the answer is not there any more.

 

Any further ideas?

Bests,

Torsten

entry.title: Re: CDS Virtual Element Filter Requirement
entry.content: Was this resolved ? please advise if it is resolved as we are facing similar situation.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!

Hello Everyone,

Thank you for the new platform. Very excited and looking forward to participate and provide alot of contents to the community.

Thank you

entry.title: how do I report on history of workspaces or projects?
entry.content: i want to create a report to track project tasks from creation to start and to mark complete. I see this info is in the project history. Has anyone done this

entry.title: how to supressing material determination in BAPI_QUOTATION_CREATEFROMDATA2?
entry.content: When I create a quote via integration and manually via se37 or VA21, the material 3000213472 is being exchanged for material 3001052292, how can I suppress this without removing the replacement condition?

entry.title: Connection between SAP SAC and Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a trial account in Datasphere, and I am unable to establish a successful connection between Datasphere (DS) and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). Even if the connection is established, I cannot access the respective Space present in DS. None of my objects in DS are visible in SAC when trying to create a connection between them. The dropdown menu does not allow me to select anything, it remains blank.

Please assist in the problem
Thanks!

entry.title: FSM HTML Report Font-size Page Counter
entry.content:
Hello experts, 
I am struggling with changing the font-size of the page counter in FSM HTML reports. 
I checked and added CSS for the print media query, but it unfortunately did not work. 


If I try to use the CSS page counter, this does not work either...

 

The font-size of the page counter is in the SAP Standard HTML report example (checkout and checklist) very big - bigger than the normal text and bigger than headings!?

 

I found that in the pdf.js the pageNumber is calculated / defined. But I didnt see the connection how this is loaded into the HTML in order to get the correct CSS selector... 

Can someone help?


Thanks so much!
Deborah

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Overview of tools for maintaining custom launchpad content and layou
entry.content:
The App Manager tool seems to be promoted a lot. But the problem is it only handles Technical Catalogs, not Business Catalogs. So we have to keep switching tools from app Manage to Content Manager every time we want to add a tile.

Also, App Manager operates only at CONF scope. Is it recommended to switch all our technical catalogs to CONF scope?

Up to now all catalogs have been created in CUST scope, technical and business, to avoid having to switch tools every time you want to do something. Is it now recommended to switch all technical catalogs to CONF, and keep the business catalogs in CUST scope?

Thanks.

entry.title: FLP: Should we use CONF or CUST scope for Technical/Business catalogs
entry.content:
We are on S/4HANA 2020. The App Manager tool seems to be promoted a lot by SAP. But the problem is it only handles Technical Catalogs, not Business Catalogs, and only in CONF scope. So we have to keep switching tools from app Manage to Content Manager every time we want to add a tile.

Up to now all our catalogs have been created in CUST scope, to avoid having to switch tools every time you want to do something.

So what is SAP's recommendation now (for a single-client systems):

1. Create all technical and Business catalogs in CONF scope. Use App Manager and Content Manager in CONF mode

2. Create Technical catalogs in CONF scope, Business catalogs in CUST mode. Use App Manager, and Content Manager in CUST mode.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: use custom message in exception subprocess with error/escalation end
entry.content: Maybe use this setting as an alternative: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/define-error-configuration

entry.title: Excel Cloud Link does not respond (SDK 1.48.34)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

Could anyone check and confirm that it is still possible to define another than one sheet in Excel Cloud Link artefact? It seems to me that I am not able to use it / achieve saving. Check the screenshots attached, pls. I am doing it for the fifth time, 30+ mins went off. Thanx. JV

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community
entry.content: I'm Al, from Azerbaijan, interested in learning and getting certified for SAP S/4 HANA to implement it and manage projects.

entry.title: Re: Initial Release of SAP Analytics Cloud Just Ask
entry.content:
Hi Sayed,
Q1. Indexed models provide better  support for match question to models metadata and better suggestions.
Q2. We don't foresee a scenario were you would massively index all your models and assume end-users will seamlessly find their answer out of these.  Instead we would recommend is cherry pick a target audience, use cases and supporting data, define synonyms based on end-user language.  We'll  go deeper is best practices in a separate blog post.
In the mean time, just ask does have in its backlog the ability to automate the creation/import of synonyms for instance from SAP Datasphere catalog.
Q3. In the initial support of SAP Datasphere, yes, user needs to select the model(s) in each SAP Analytics Cloud session.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Calendar integration into Microsoft Office 365 (incl. Microsoft Teams)
entry.content:
Hi Johannes,
In this web page below about how to "Register an application with the Microsoft identity platform" (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/auth-register-app-v2),
it is not clear what credentials we should use (certificate ? Client-secret) on Azure side for enabling SAC connection to Azure...
And also what should we configure in SAC tenant for the same topic ?

Thanks in advance, Rémy

entry.title: Re: Setting up Realignment in IBP
entry.content:
Hi Kunal Roy,

Excellent overview. When realigning based off actuals qty, do you have an issue with actuals qty being repopulated after integration? If so, are you running the realignment project nightly in an integration application job?

entry.title: Re: FMEA S/4 Hana Process
entry.content:
Hi Asuvn,

thank you for the details provided.

  1. I recommend to read SAP Help here:
    'Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (QM-PT-FA)'
    https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/2bc3ee8d1c83404e8cf62418640004f2/b2d3b65334e6b54ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US
  2. Also, read the IMG documentation for the FMEA nodes in customizing (transaction QCC0), see:

Have a nice day,
​Albert
​***
​Read and follow the 'SAP Community Rules of Engagement' at
​https://www.sap.com/community/about/rules-of-engagement.html

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I'm Al, from Azerbaijan, and currently studying for my MBA degree from a US university. I am very interested in the SAP digital skills initiative, would like to learn and get certified for the S/4 HANA implementation as well as project management (I hold a PMP certification). The educational costs so far have been overwhelming for me. Nevertheless, I feel that learning SAP is very important for me in business.

I qualify under the following provisions: 

  • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
  • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Attributed Profitability Segment in CO-PA: Concept and Int. Order Scenario in S/4 HANA 1809
entry.content: For @marcoseiler : see OSS note 2439201 point 1 "The logic only considers settlement rules with 100% assignment to profitability segment."

entry.title: Re: keep old ABAP versions, ie in Git (?)
entry.content: Hi @Karin and @larshp , hopefully you don't mind this mentioning to entice you to comment... Cheers, Wout

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports formula get value from another column...
entry.content:
Hi gr_cr05, create a new formula using the code below. A set of arrays is used to keep track of the sample_number and text_id values and each current parent_aliquot is matched up with the sample_number array. This of course assumes that the data is coming in a specific order like in your sample data.

 

whileprintingrecords;

//////////////////
// set these 3 vars to your fields
/////////////////

numbervar thisId := {Command.sample_number};
stringvar thisValue := {Command.text_id};
numbervar thisParent := {Command.parent_aliquot};


//////////////////
// the code below does not need to be modified
/////////////////

// vars for worker arrays
stringvar output;
numbervar i;
numbervar array allIds;
stringvar array allValues;

// vars for finding member position in array
numbervar counter:= 1;
numbervar thisIdPosition:= 0;

// add current row values to arrays
i:= i + 1;
redim preserve allIds[i];
allIds[i] := thisId;
redim preserve allValues[i];
allValues[i] := thisValue;

// check for match between parent and Id
while counter < ubound(allIds) do (
    if thisParent = allIds[counter] 
    then (
        thisIdPosition := counter; 
        exit while
    );
    counter := counter + 1
);

// assign output
if thisIdPosition > 0
then output := allValues[counter]
else output := "";

output;

entry.title: Re: Charting on Print-Time Formulas or shared variables a...
entry.content: This can be a tricky workaround. Ensure that the each of the string running totals has the same number of values. Also ensure that the string running total that is being converted to a number array later on contains only numeric values. The final subreport for the chart should be in the Report Footer section and its record set should match the main report record set...look at the sample where the main report and the chart subreport have the same 5 customer records.

entry.title: Re: What's New for SAP Build Apps - Enhanced Fusion Development
entry.content:
Did anyone manage to make Cloud Functions work with the deployed app (not in preview)?
I applied these steps to 3 different tenants, but when the app tries to read something from the backend, there is a 403 error.

entry.title: Re: Connection between SAP SAC and Datasphere
entry.content: Hi @yusra, where do you try to access the SAP Datasphere from SAC? Where is that dropdown? Screenshots and steps in SAC would be helpful to understand the issue.

entry.title: Re: Log Analysis for the Standard Framework of Situation Handling
entry.content:
Hi Axel, this is indeed a problem I'm facing with the Extended framework. 

@Dr_Joerg_Rett I checked and found a record of SIT2_RT_BATCH in which the situation type was found. But it couldnt figure out the instances. Below is the complete log.

 

CL_SIT2_TRIG_BATCH_HANDLER====CP
Batch Handler called
Calling Scheduler
SitnType(s)[1]-SITNTYPEID =Z_TEST_PURCHASEREQ_SOURCEOFSUPPLY2
SitnType(s)[1]-SITNTYPETRIGGEREDDATETIME =20240322141934.0691150
SitnType(s)[1]-SITNEVENTOBJECT =SITUATION
SitnType(s)[1]-SITNEVENTTYPE =BATCH
SitnType(s)[1]-SITNEVENTOBJECTKEY =<INITIAL>
SitnType(s)[1]-SITNTYPEXMLRAWSTRING =<INITIAL>
SitnType(s)[1]-SITNEVENTXMLRAWSTRING =<INITIAL>
SitnType(s)[1]-SITNENGINETYPE =01
CL_SIT2_SCHEDULER=============CP
Work Process Runtime
maximum runtime of process =3600
maximum runtime of dia process =5400
Work Processes
# Background Process used =<INITIAL>
# Dialog Process used by Engine =<INITIAL>
# Dialog Process used by Instances =<INITIAL>
# Dialog Process Available =1
# Background Processes Available =<INITIAL>
Determining - Situation Types to be Executed
SITTYPE[1]-CLIENT =200
SITTYPE[1]-SITNTYPEID =Z_TEST_PURCHASEREQ_SOURCEOFSUPPLY2
SITTYPE[1]-SITNTYPETRIGGEREDDATETIME =20240322141934.0691150
SITTYPE[1]-SITNTYPEEXECUTEDDATETIME =20240322141934.0942740
SITTYPE[1]-SITNTYPECOMPLETEDDATETIME =<INITIAL>
SITTYPE[1]-SITNTYPEQUEUESTATUS =02
SITTYPE[1]-SITNTYPEEXECUTIONRETRYCOUNT =<INITIAL>
SITTYPE[1]-SITNEVENTOBJECT =SITUATION
SITTYPE[1]-SITNEVENTTYPE =BATCH
SITTYPE[1]-SITNEVENTOBJECTKEY =<INITIAL>
SITTYPE[1]-SITNENGINETYPE =01
Determining - Instances to be Executed
Message =No Instance to Execute , Continue
CL_SIT2_TRIG_BATCH_HANDLER====CP
Batch Handler returned

The Engine that run at the same time found 74 instances. That log also contains three warnings, could that be the reason?
Message =RETURN - Navigation Target Mappings not defined
Message =Event XML data is empty, CONTINUE
Message =Situation Type XML data is empty, CONTINUE

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Currency Conversion Issue on Calculated Measure
entry.content:
Hi friends,

let me introduce you into my issue:

I have two Measures with which I create a third measure:

With following calculation Iam creating the "Price" measure:

As you can see it works perfectly fine.

Now I set the Unit for "Gross Sales" to "Currency".

Unfortunately, the calculated measure does not work anymore. As you can see here:

Here is the reason:

The Price needs to be aggregated, otherwise it does not make sense. 

I tried a lot and found a workaround. I create a restricted measure based on "Gross Sales" and set the Unit to "None" and then it works again. But it needs to work without a workaround. So what is causing the problem I have?

Looking forwar hearing from you!

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: CDP-23559 - Why only for Development Goals?
entry.content: Being able to access development goals based on RBP instead of on employee relationships is a huge enhancement with a lot of use cases. It seems to only be available for developmeng goals, not performance goals. If this is the case, why the limitation?

entry.title: CDP-23559 - RBP role usable for integrations?
entry.content: Will the new TA role also support integrations (use case: use an integration user with RBP permissions to a subset of employees to upsert/delete goals from a third party system)

entry.title: Re: Campaign Approval Workflow restart after rejection
entry.content:
Hi,

Which type of workflow have you created? Do you have conditions or select the approver when submitting for approval.

There is no such process that on a 2nd submit for approval that it is released directly. Either there is a workflow setup, either there is not. Without a concrete example, it is hard to comment on this specific situation.

In case you still have an issue, create an incident for CEC-MKT-WF.

Best Regards, Isabelle Product Owner SAP Marketing Cloud

entry.title: Re: corrupt data when uploading html file with GUI_UPLOAD
entry.content:
I still do not know what the problem is, but I found an alternative to the process:

      DATA(lo_gos_api) = cl_gos_api=>create_instance(
        VALUE #(
          instid = CONV #( p_myid )
          typeid = 'MYTYPEID'
          catid  = 'BO' ) ).

      DATA(ls_attcont) = VALUE gos_s_attcont(
        atta_id   = 'MYTYPEID'
        atta_cat  = cl_gos_api=>c_msg
        cr_user   = sy-uname
        cr_name   = space
        cr_date   = sy-datum
        cr_time   = sy-uzeit
        filesize  = filelength
        filename  = zcl_devt_file=>get_filename_from_path( p_file )
        tech_type = zcl_devt_file=>get_extension_from_filename( p_file )
        descr     = p_descr
        lang      = sy-langu
        content   = space
        content_x = cl_bcs_convert=>xtab_to_xstring( lt_contx ) ).
      lo_gos_api->insert_al_item(
        EXPORTING
          is_attcont = ls_attcont
          iv_roltype = cl_gos_api=>c_attachment
        IMPORTING
          ev_atta_id = DATA(ev_atta_id)
        RECEIVING
          rv_commit  = DATA(commit_required)   ).
      IF commit_required = abap_true.
        COMMIT WORK.
        "file has been added.
        MESSAGE i036 WITH p_bugid.
      ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Can I extend a certain app? With Clean Core? How?
entry.content: Wow! A comprehensive blog I was looking for. Thank you for sharing.

entry.title: Problem with nativescript plugin when deploying
entry.content:
Hi experts im trying to implement a Audio recorder for my aplication with this plugin

@nativescript-community/audio
but when i tried to import the plugin i had this error when deploying the application.
 
I alredy declare the plugin in the  "mdk.bundlerExternals"
 
/**
 * Describe this function...
 * @Param {IClientAPI} clientAPI
 */

import * as Recorder from "@nativescript-community/audio"
import { TNSRecorder } from '@nativescript-community/audio';
export default function RecordAudio(clientAPI) {
 
let recorder = new TNSRecorder();
let isRecording = false;
  if (!isRecording) {
    // Start recording
    const options = {
      filename: 'testrecording.mp3',
      errorCallback: function(err) {
        console.log('error recording', err);
      }
    };

    recorder.start(options).then(() => {
      console.log('recording started');
      isRecording = true;
      // Show message
      return clientAPI.executeAction({
        'Name': '/Recorder/Actions/Messages/CustomMessage.action',
        'Properties': {
          'Message': `Grabando`
        }
      });
    }, (err) => {
      console.log('error starting', err);
    });
  } else {
    // Stop recording
    recorder.stop().then(() => {
      console.log('recording stopped');
      isRecording = false;
      // Show message
      return clientAPI.executeAction({
        'Name': '/Recorder/Actions/Messages/CustomMessage.action',
        'Properties': {
          'Message': `Grabación terminada`
        }
      });
    }, (err) => {
      console.log('error stopping', err);
    });
  }
}



Command failed: "/managed-content/vscode/unzipped/25__@ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel__mde-vscweb@4.2.13/extension/node_modules/@sap/mdk-tools/bin/mdkcli.sh" bundle --nativescript-project "/home/user/projects/Recorder/.build/Recorder/.build" --seam-project "/home/user/projects/Recorder/.build/Recorder" --externals nativescript-audio --filters /Recorder/Web/ /Recorder/Recorder/Web --bundle-zip-target-path "/home/user/projects/Recorder/.build/Recorder/.build" --bundle-definition-path "out/Recorder" --devtool "source-map" --create-bundle --ts-target "es6" --wmf
MDK Bundler - failed to create bundle
asset bundle.js 79.4 KiB [emitted] (name: bundle.js) (id hint: vendors) 1 related asset
asset dummy.js 78.3 KiB [emitted] (name: dummy.js) 1 related asset
runtime modules 4.91 KiB 10 modules
modules by path ./build.definitions/Recorder/ 30.4 KiB
javascript modules 30.4 KiB 51 modules
json modules 64 bytes
./build.definitions/Recorder/jsconfig.json 52 bytes [built] [code generated]
./build.definitions/Recorder/Styles/Styles.light.json 12 bytes [built] [code generated]
modules by path ../../../../css-loader/dist/runtime/*.js 2.74 KiB
../../../../css-loader/dist/runtime/sourceMaps.js 505 bytes [built] [code generated]
../../../../css-loader/dist/runtime/api.js 2.25 KiB [built] [code generated]
container entry 42 bytes [built] [code generated]
./build.definitions/application-index.js 10.6 KiB [built] [code generated]
./build.definitions/Application.app 519 bytes [built] [code generated]
./build.definitions/tsconfig.json 397 bytes [built] [code generated]
./build.definitions/version.mdkbundlerversion 16 bytes [built] [code generated]

ERROR in ./build.definitions/Recorder/Rules/RecordAudio.js 8:0-57
Module not found: Error: Can't resolve '@nativescript-community/audio' in '/managed-content/vscode/unzipped/25__@ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel__mde-vscweb@4.2.13/extension/node_modules/@sap/mdk-tools/out/Recorder/build.definitions/Recorder/Rules'
resolve '@nativescript-community/audio' in '/managed-content/vscode/unzipped/25__@ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel__mde-vscweb@4.2.13/extension/node_modules/@sap/mdk-tools/out/Recorder/build.definitions/Recorder/Rules'
Parsed request is a module
using description file: /managed-content/vscode/unzipped/25__@ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel__mde-vscweb@4.2.13/extension/node_modules/@sap/mdk-tools/package.json (relative path: ./out/Recorder/build.definitions/Recorder/Rules)
Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration
resolve as module
/managed-content/vscode/unzipped/25__@ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel__mde-vscweb@4.2.13/extension/node_modules/@sap/mdk-tools/out/Recorder/build.definitions/Recorder/Rules/__dummy_node_modules__ doesn't exist or is not a directory
/managed-content/vscode/unzipped/25__@ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel__mde-vscweb@4.2.13/extension/node_modules/@sap/mdk-tools/out/Recorder/build.definitions/Recorder/__dummy_node_modules__ doesn't exist or is not a directory
/managed-content/vscode/unzipped/25__@ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel__mde-vscweb@4.2.13/extension/node_modules/@sap/mdk-tools/out/Recorder/build.definitions/__dummy_node_modules__ doesn't exist or is not a directory
/managed-content/vscode/unzipped/25__@ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel__mde-vscweb@4.2.13/extension/node_modules/@sap/mdk-tools/out/Recorder/__dummy_node_modules__ doesn't exist or is not a directory

entry.title: ATP check based on sales order type
entry.content:
There is a requirement to determine Avail check and Checking rule based on Sales document type. In other words for a given plant, Consignment fill up order type does not need to consider storage location check, whereas for same plant, sample orders requires storage location check. System is S/4 HANA with standard ATP (not advanced ATP).

Any suggestions will be welcome. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Missing purpose string in Info.plist
entry.content: (PT-BR) Alguma novidade, aqui no escritório esta virando um CAOS, temos uma aplicação IOS para atualizar, estão querendo meu pescoço.

entry.title: Re: #COE #BA01 Cost Center on Asset Acquisition credit
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,

When a GL account of Primary Cost (Expense GL Account) is used in the Post Asset Acquisition app, the system derives the cost center and profit center of the Fixed Asset Master Data. 

The responsible cost center of the WBS Statistical project is not derived from any journal entry posted.

Example:

I created an Expense GL Account.

The new Expense GL account was used in the Supplier invoice with the cost center and the statistical WBS.

The new Expense GL account was used in the Post Asset Acquisition. The system is deriving the Cost Center and the Profit Center of the Fixed Asset Master Data.

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements app is not returning data after in...
entry.content: There are no error messages.

entry.title: Re: I18n internationalization in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi,
It's currently not possible to edit DM i18n.
See https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/operations-guide/language-support for DM language support details.
Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: b1s file not created on build
entry.content:
Hi,

did you get this working? I'm having the same problem. Also tried reinstalling Visual Studio (different versions), reinstalling SAP Business One Studio, deleting VS files, etc. But the .b1s isn't created anymore when building my Add-On.

Thanks,
Edward

entry.title: Re: WBS closure date
entry.content: There is nothing "out of the box", but you can link PROJ and PRPS with JEST in SQVI for example. And can be two other tables to make it look better...
